templatePack.unknownFallback: The site theme "{name}" is not recognized. The default layout is shown until you pick a valid theme under Site configuration.

albums.noAlbumsText: No public albums are available at the moment.
albums.rootLevelAlbumsDescription: Root-level public albums from your gallery.
albums.confirmReReadExif: Are you sure you want to re-read EXIF data for all photos in this album? This may take a while for albums with many photos.
albums.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{albumName}"? This action cannot be undone.
albums.deleteUnknownError: An unknown error occurred while deleting the album
albums.commentsSignIn: Sign in to post a comment.
albums.commentsModeratorHint: Album owners and admins can hide comments.
albums.commentsMentionHint: Mention someone with @username (they get a notification if they use the site).

notifications.signInPrompt: Sign in to see your notifications.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find photos and albums quickly
search.noResultsDescription: Try adjusting your search terms or filters
search.startSearchingDescription: Enter a search term or use filters to find photos and albums

auth.accessAdminPanel: Access your photo gallery management admin panel
auth.accessGallery: Sign in to access your photo gallery and view private albums
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
auth.needAccess: Need access? Contact your system administrator.

footer.systemDescription: A comprehensive photo gallery management system

admin.selectLanguageToEditTranslations: Select a language to edit translations
admin.translationsObjectEmptyCheckConsole: Translations object is empty. Check console for errors.
admin.manageGallerySettings: Manage your gallery settings and content
admin.configureGallery: Configure your gallery title, description, theme colors, and SEO settings.
admin.siteConfigTemplateSectionIntro: See which templates are active and open the right tool: manage themes, adjust component visibility, use the theme builder, or edit advanced JSON.
admin.siteConfigTemplateFooterHint: Apply the active theme under Manage themes. Component visibility and the theme builder change how pages render without editing code.
admin.configureStorage: Configure storage providers (Google Drive, AWS S3, Local) for your photos.
admin.chooseTemplate: Choose and customize the visual theme and layout of your gallery.
admin.createEditAlbums: Create, edit, and manage your photo albums and collections.
admin.managePeopleStructuredData: Manage people who appear in your photos with structured data
admin.manageTagsStructuredData: Manage tags for categorizing and organizing your photos with structured data
admin.tagsFeedbackSignalsSubtitle: Observed apply/dismiss activity from AI and context suggestions.
admin.tagsDeleteConfirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete
admin.tagsDeleteUsedWarningSuffix: . Deleting it will remove the tag from all photos.
admin.manageLocationsStructuredData: Manage locations for your photos with structured data including coordinates and addresses
admin.uploadOrganizePhotos: Upload, organize, and manage your photos across all albums.
admin.manageUsersRoles: Manage users, roles and group memberships.
admin.defineUserGroups: Define user groups (e.g., family, friends) with multi-language names.
admin.analyticsDescription: View comprehensive statistics about your gallery
admin.analyticsSearchTagFiltersSubtitle: Based on logged searches that included at least one tag filter (site and API v1).
admin.analyticsAvgResultsWithTagFilter: Avg results when tag filter used
admin.analyticsTagFilterByTypeTitle: Tag filter usage by search type
admin.analyticsTopTagPairsTitle: Most used tag pairs in filters
admin.analyticsNoTagFilterSearchesInPeriod: No searches with tag filters in this period.
admin.analyticsAIProvidersHealthSubtitle: Current provider selection and fallback readiness
admin.analyticsNoNewTagsLast30Days: No new tags in the last 30 days
admin.analyticsFailedToLoadAIProvidersHealth: Failed to load AI providers health
admin.viewStatistics: View statistics and insights about your gallery usage and performance.
admin.seoMetaTitleHelp: Recommended length: 50–60 characters per language. This appears in browser tabs and search results.
admin.seoMetaDescriptionHelp: Recommended length: 150–160 characters per language. This appears in search engine results.
admin.seoMetaDescriptionInputPlaceholder: Discover amazing photos in our beautiful gallery
admin.metaKeywordsHelp: Enter keywords separated by commas. They help search engines understand your content.
admin.ogImageHelp: Optional. Image shown when your site is shared on social media. Recommended size: 1200×630px.
admin.configureStorageProviders: Configure and manage your storage providers for photo uploads and management.
admin.analyticsUnderDevelopment: The analytics dashboard is currently under development. This feature will provide insights into your gallery usage, photo views, user engagement, and performance metrics.
admin.startByAddingFirstLocation: Start by adding your first location.
admin.locationDeleteConfirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete
admin.locationDeleteUsedWarningSuffix: . Deleting it will remove the location from all photos.
admin.templateHasOverridesInfo: This template has custom overrides applied. Changes will be merged with the base template configuration.
admin.serviceAccountHelp: Service account avoids OAuth popups and token expiry. Create a service account in Google Cloud, share a Drive folder with its email, then paste the JSON key below.
admin.serviceAccountJsonPlaceholder: Paste the full contents of your service account key JSON. Must include "client_email" and "private_key".
admin.serviceAccountJsonHelp: Download the JSON key from Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service Accounts → your account → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON.
admin.renewTokenHelp: Click Renew Token to open Google's authorization window and automatically save a new refresh token.
admin.enterAndSaveClientIdAndSecretFirst: Please enter and save Client ID and Client Secret first.
admin.manageTranslationsDescription: Review and edit translations for all interface texts across languages.
admin.manageThemesDescription: Manage and apply themes. All themes (built-in and custom) are in one place.
admin.noTemplatesYetRestartBackend: No themes yet. Restart the backend to seed built-in themes.
admin.applyThemeDescription: This will replace the current site theme with this theme's design.
admin.previewCurrentPageHelp: Temporarily shows this theme in the admin UI on the page you are viewing. Nothing is saved to the site until you apply.
admin.removeThemeDescription: This will permanently remove the theme. Built-in themes can be re-seeded by restarting the backend.
admin.getStartedByCreatingFirstAlbum: Get started by creating your first album.
admin.confirmDeleteAlbum: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This will delete all photos and sub-albums. This action cannot be undone.
admin.reExtractExifTitle: Re-extract EXIF from file for selected photos
admin.regenerateThumbnailsTitle: Regenerate small/medium/large thumbnails with correct orientation
admin.confirmDeletePhoto: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
admin.setTagsDescription: Select tags to assign (replaces existing tags on selected photos).
admin.setMetadataDescription: Set rating, category, and/or EXIF overrides. Leave blank to leave unchanged.
admin.confirmDeleteAlbumWithPhotos: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and will also delete all photos in this album.
admin.startByAddingFirstUser: Start by adding your first user.
admin.confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete {name} ({username})? This action cannot be undone.
admin.activeAdminDeleteWarning: This is an active admin user. Make sure there are other active admins before deleting.
admin.dedicatedStorageCheckboxHelp: When enabled, this owner configures credentials per provider on Owner → Storage (not the shared profile storage block). Use Allowed Storage Providers to choose which backends they may use.
admin.ownerCreatedNextSteps: Editor (gallery owner) created. Add custom domains below if needed, then click Update user to save other changes.
admin.ownerDomainsRequiresOwnerRole: Custom domains are only available when Role is set to {roleLabel} (gallery owner). Change Role above first.
admin.ownerDomainsIntro: Visitors on these hostnames see only this owner’s public content; they use /admin on that same host for the owner panel. Use the exact hostname the browser sends (include :port in local dev, e.g. photos.localhost:4000).
admin.ownerDomainsDnsPoint1: Create a DNS A, AAAA, or CNAME record pointing the hostname to your frontend server or load balancer.
admin.ownerDomainsDnsPoint2: Terminate HTTPS at your reverse proxy or host; the app does not obtain certificates for you.
admin.ownerDomainsDnsPoint3: Ensure your proxy forwards Host (or X-Forwarded-Host) to the app so the backend can resolve the owner.
admin.ownerDomainsDnsPoint4: Mark one domain as Primary if this owner has several hostnames (used for future canonical URL preferences).
admin.ownerDomainsEmptyHint: Enter a hostname and click Add domain. No domains assigned yet.
admin.dedicatedStorageOwnerNextSteps: The owner should open Owner → Storage (or /owner/storage) to enter provider credentials for each allowed backend. You can save this user now and they can configure storage after first login.
admin.configurationSavedMessage: Your site configuration has been saved successfully. Redirecting to admin dashboard...
admin.supportedFormats: Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG. Max size: 5MB.
admin.defaultLanguageDescription: The default language will be used when content is not available in the user's preferred language.
admin.selectLanguagesDescription: Select which languages are available for content editing. Only selected languages will appear in multi-language fields.
admin.enterSiteTitlePlaceholder: Enter site title in current language...
admin.enterSiteDescriptionPlaceholder: Enter site description in current language...
admin.storageSettingsDescription: Configure and manage your storage providers for photo uploads and management.
admin.cloudStorageWithGoogleDrive: Cloud storage with Google Drive API
admin.storageTypeAppdataDescription: Files will be stored in a hidden AppData folder, not visible to users in Google Drive.
admin.storageTypeVisibleDescription: Files will be visible in the user's Google Drive. Users can see and manage them directly.
admin.enterGoogleDriveFolderId: Enter Google Drive Folder ID or URL
admin.folderIdHelp: Specify a folder ID to store files in a specific folder. Leave empty to use the root of Drive.
admin.needHelpSettingUpGoogleDrive: 📖 Need help setting up Google Drive? Click here for step-by-step instructions
admin.absolutePathDescription: Absolute path to the directory where photos will be stored
admin.failedToSaveGoogleDriveConfiguration: Failed to save Google Drive configuration
admin.failedToSaveAwsS3Configuration: Failed to save AWS S3 configuration
admin.failedToSaveLocalStorageConfiguration: Failed to save Local Storage configuration
admin.googleDriveConnectionFailed: Google Drive connection failed. Check your configuration.
admin.connectionTestFailed: Connection test failed. Please try again.
admin.googleClientIdNotSet: Google Client ID is not set. Please set it first.
admin.clickGeneratedUrlToAuthorize: Click the generated URL to authorize OpenShutter with Google Drive.
admin.templateManagementDescription: Choose and customize your gallery's visual theme
admin.noPublicAlbumsAvailable: No public albums are available at the moment.
admin.albumsOverview: Overview and management of all photo albums
admin.getStartedCreateAlbum: Get started by creating a new album.
admin.uploadPhotosToSetCover: Upload photos to this album or its child albums to set a cover photo.
admin.createUsersAssignGroups: Create users and assign them to groups.
admin.groupsHelp: Groups help organize users (e.g., family, friends).
admin.name: Name
admin.backupRestoreDescription: Create backups and restore your data
admin.databaseBackupDescription: Export all database collections to JSON
admin.backupWarningText: Backup and restore operations will affect your entire application. Make sure to test restore operations in a development environment first. Database restore will replace all existing data.
admin.importSyncDescription: Import content from external storage providers
admin.googleDriveImportDescription: Scan and import folders and photos from Google Drive
admin.importInfo3: Imports photos with EXIF data extraction
admin.importWarningText: Import process may take time depending on the number of files. Do not close the browser during import. Large imports are processed in batches to prevent timeouts.
admin.getStartedByCreatingCategory: Get started by creating your first category
admin.title: Title
admin.templateConfigSubtitle: Configure which components are visible in your template
admin.templateConfigCurrentDescription: Configure which components should be visible in this template. Changes will apply immediately.
admin.templateConfigHeroDescription: The main hero section displayed on the home page
admin.templateConfigLanguageSelectorDescriptio: Language selection dropdown in the header
admin.templateConfigAuthButtonsDescription: Login and logout buttons in the header
admin.templateConfigFooterMenuDescription: Footer menu and links at the bottom of pages
admin.templateConfigStatisticsDescription: Statistics section showing album and photo counts below the albums grid
admin.templateConfigPromotionDescription: Promotion section with call-to-action buttons below the statistics
admin.startByAddingFirstTag: Start by adding your first tag
admin.viewSystemActivity: View system activity and user actions
admin.pagesManagementDescription: Create and manage internal pages like About Us, Our Story, etc.
admin.startByCreatingFirstPage: Start by creating your first page.
admin.brandingLogoHelp: Upload your logo image. Recommended size: 200x50px or similar aspect ratio. Max size: 5MB.
admin.brandingCurrentLogoUrl: Current logo URL (you can edit manually):
admin.brandingFaviconHelp: Upload your favicon. Recommended size: 32x32px or 16x16px (ICO or PNG format). Max size: 5MB.
admin.brandingCurrentFaviconUrl: Current favicon URL (you can edit manually):
admin.whiteLabelSectionHelp: When "Hide OpenShutter branding" is enabled, "OpenShutter" is hidden from footers, headers, and page titles. The product display name uses the optional field below if set, otherwise the site title from Basic settings.
admin.whiteLabelProductNameHelp: Per language. Used in headers, footers, and emails (including {{siteTitle}}) when set; otherwise the site title is used.
admin.whiteLabelAssetsHelp: Optional logo and favicon used only on the public site when set. Global logo/favicon above still apply for admin and as fallbacks.
admin.navigationMenuHelp: Configure your site's navigation menu. You can use translation keys (for example, 'navigation.home') or direct labels.
admin.navigationTranslationKeyHelp: Use a translation key (for example, 'navigation.home') for multilingual support.
admin.navigationDirectLabelHelp: Direct text label (used if translation key is not provided).
admin.navigationTypeHelp: Login = link to sign in; Logout = button that signs out.
admin.navigationShowWhenHelp: Show this item based on user login status.
admin.navigationLinkUrlHelp: Page URL or external link (for example, /about).
admin.navigationRolesHelp: Leave unchecked to show to everyone. Check roles to restrict visibility.
admin.navigationNoItemsHelp: If no menu items are configured, default menu items will be used.
admin.navigationClearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all menu items? Default menu will be used.
admin.navigationTipType: Use Type Login or Logout to add sign-in / sign-out buttons; use Show when to show items only when logged in or logged out.
admin.navigationTipTranslationKey: Use Translation Key for multilingual support (for example, 'navigation.home').
admin.navigationTipDirectLabel: Use Direct Label for simple text labels (for example, 'About').
admin.navigationTipPriority: If both are provided, Translation Key takes precedence.
admin.navigationTipRolesRestrict: Check roles to restrict menu visibility (for example, check 'admin' to show only to admins).
admin.navigationTipRolesOpen: Leave roles unchecked to show the menu item to everyone.
admin.navigationTipExternal: Check "Open in new tab" for external links.
admin.exifDisplaySectionHelp: Choose which EXIF fields to show to visitors when a photo includes them (for example in the photo lightbox). Leave all unchecked to show every available field.
admin.exifDisplayFooterHelp: If no fields are selected, all available EXIF fields are shown. A field appears only when the photo actually contains that metadata.
admin.iptcXmpDisplaySectionHelp: Choose which IPTC/XMP fields to show to visitors when a photo includes them (for example in the photo lightbox). Leave all unchecked to show every available field.
admin.iptcXmpDisplayFooterHelp: If no fields are selected, all available IPTC/XMP fields are shown. A field appears only when the photo actually contains that metadata.
admin.collaborationMatrixHelp: Use the first column to turn each service on or off site-wide. When a service is on, choose whether visitors (not signed in) and signed-in users can see it. Posting comments, reporting, and tasks require a signed-in user when the signed-in column is enabled for that service.
admin.collabServiceCommentsDesc: Comments: discussion on the album (threaded replies, optional per-photo comments in the lightbox, @mentions, report, and moderation). Visitors and signed-in users can read lists when the matching column is on; posting and reporting require sign-in and the signed-in column for comments.
admin.collabServiceTasksDesc: Tasks: a to-do list for the album (create, mark done, optional owner approval). Only signed-in users can add or change tasks; the columns control who can see the task section.
admin.collabServiceActivityDesc: Activity feed: a read-only timeline of recent events on the album (comments, tasks, approvals). The columns control who can see this feed.
admin.collaborationModeratorNote: Album owners and admins always see all collaboration sections on albums they can access, so they can moderate even when a column is off for normal users.
admin.tagSearchFeedbackBoostSectionHelp: When enabled, photo search with tag filters uses apply/dismiss signals from tag feedback to slightly adjust relevance (off by default; needs feedback data).
admin.tagSearchFeedbackBoostEnable: Boost tag search ranking using feedback
admin.socialSharingSectionHelp: Control whether sharing is enabled and where share buttons appear. Choose which services to show (X, Facebook, WhatsApp, copy link).
admin.smtpSectionHelp: Configure SMTP to send emails (for example, a welcome email when a new user is created). Leave blank to disable sending.
admin.smtpPortHelp: Use 587 for STARTTLS (recommended) or 465 for SSL. Connection type is automatic.
admin.smtpPasswordHelp: Leave blank to keep the existing password. Backend masks the stored value as ****.
admin.welcomeEmailSectionHelp: Send a welcome email when a new user is created. Enable below and set subject/body. You can use placeholders in both fields.
admin.welcomeEmailEnabledLabel: Send welcome email on new user creation
admin.welcomeEmailBodyPlaceholder:
Hi {{name}},

Welcome! Your username is {{username}}. Log in here: {{loginUrl}}
admin.welcomeEmailPasswordNote: initial password set at user creation; optional; sending passwords by email is less secure
admin.sendTestEmailHelp: Uses current SMTP config. Save first if you changed it.
admin.imageUploadNote: Note: Full image upload functionality will be available in a future update
admin.languageCodeAndNameRequired: Language code and name are required
admin.marketplaceDescription: Review and approve API integration submissions

owner.manageYourAlbums: Manage your photo albums and collections
owner.editProfileDescription: Edit your profile information and change your password
owner.createEditMyAlbums: Create, edit, and manage your photo albums
owner.confirmDeleteAlbum: Are you sure you want to delete this album? This action cannot be undone.
owner.name: Name
owner.currentPasswordHelp: Leave blank to keep current password
owner.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long
owner.publicHelp: Allow anyone to view this album
owner.featuredHelp: Show this album prominently on the homepage
owner.selectStorageProvider: Select where to store this album
owner.storageProviderHelp: Choose where your album photos will be stored
owner.parentAlbumHelp: Choose a parent album to create a sub-album, or leave empty for root level
owner.createAlbumLongDescription: Create a new album with hierarchical organization and storage provider selection.
owner.albumAliasHelp: This will be used in the folder structure and URLs.
owner.albumNameAliasRequired: Album name and alias are required.
owner.failedToCreateAlbumInvalidResponse: Failed to create album - invalid response format.
owner.failedToLoadStorageOptions: Failed to load storage options. Please check your configuration.
owner.noStorageProvidersHint: Please configure and enable at least one storage provider in the admin panel.
owner.storageDedicatedNotice: You are on dedicated storage: each provider below uses credentials stored for your account only (not the shared site profile).
owner.storageNoProvidersDedicated: No storage providers are allowed for your account yet, or none are configured. Ask an administrator to enable providers for your user and save a configuration.
owner.storageLocalDedicatedHelp: Files are stored on the server under this path (relative to the app working directory, or absolute).
owner.storageGoogleDedicatedHint: Credentials are saved to your dedicated storage configuration.
owner.storageGenericDedicatedHelp: Edit the JSON configuration for this provider (same shape as admin storage settings), then save.
owner.createEditBlogArticles: Create, edit, and manage your blog articles
owner.developerApiDescription: API keys and documentation for the public API
owner.developerPortalIntro: Use the public API to integrate with your gallery: read albums and photos, search, and manage tags using API keys.
owner.searchInsightsDescription: See how visitors use tag filters when searching your gallery (including your custom domain).
owner.analyticsPageSubtitle: Tag filter usage for searches tied to your account or your custom-domain site.
owner.analyticsAdminUseAdminPanel: Search analytics for the whole site are available in the admin panel.
owner.developerMarketplaceDescription: Browse approved integrations, tools, and apps. Submit your own integration for review.
owner.developerKeysDescription: Create and manage API keys. Each key can have its own scopes and rate limit tier. Keys are shown only once on creation.
owner.developerDocsDescription: Interactive OpenAPI (Swagger) documentation for the v1 API. Try endpoints and use your API key for authentication.
owner.developerQuickStartStep1: Create an API key in the API Keys section with the scopes you need (for example: read, albums:read, photos:read).
owner.developerQuickStartStep2: Use the key in requests via the Authorization header (Bearer osk_xxx...) or the ?api_key=osk_xxx query parameter.
owner.developerQuickStartStep3: Call the v1 API base at /api/v1/ (for example: GET /api/v1/albums).
owner.developerQuickStartStep4: Check rate limits via response headers such as X-RateLimit-*.
owner.siteSettingsDescription: Set site name, description, logo, hero, SEO, contact and footer for your custom domain
owner.themeDescription: Layout, header options and menu for your custom domain
owner.storageManagementDescription: Configure your storage connection and folder settings for the providers enabled for you
owner.siteSettingsHero: Set the site name and description shown when visitors open your custom domain (mini-site).
owner.siteSettingsEditorsOnly: Only gallery owners can manage site settings. Admins configure the main site in Site Configuration.
owner.siteNameHelp: The name of your site shown in the header and page titles when visitors use your custom domain.
owner.siteDescriptionHelp: A short description of your site (e.g. for the homepage or meta description).
owner.siteDescriptionPlaceholder: Enter a short description of your gallery...
owner.siteLogoHelp: Logo shown in the header when visitors use your custom domain. Upload an image (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG, max 2MB) or paste a URL. Leave empty to use the main site logo.
owner.faviconHelp: Browser tab icon. Paste a URL to an .ico or image.
owner.heroHelp: Title and subtitle shown at the top of your home page. Leave empty to use the main site hero.
owner.seoHelp: Meta title and description for search engines on your domain.
owner.siteSettingsSaved: Site settings saved. Your custom domain will show these settings.
owner.themeEditorsOnly: Only gallery owners can manage theme settings.
owner.themeHomeLayoutHelp: Grid size for the home page (rows × columns).
owner.themeMenuHelp: Navigation links shown in the header.
owner.themeNoMenuItems: No menu items. Add default items or add your own.
owner.themeSaved: Theme saved. Layout, header, and menu will apply on your custom domain.
owner.manageYourBlogArticles: Manage your blog articles and content
owner.getStartedByCreatingArticle: Get started by creating your first article
owner.title: Title
owner.confirmDeleteArticle: Are you sure you want to delete this article? This action cannot be undone.
owner.createArticleDescription: Create a new blog article with rich content
owner.contentHelp: You can use HTML tags for formatting
owner.imageUploadHelp: Click to upload an image (max 10MB, JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP)
owner.invalidImageType: Please select a valid image file
owner.imageTooLarge: Image size must be less than 10MB
owner.bioHelp: Write a brief description about yourself. You can use rich text formatting.
owner.profileImageNote: Note: Full image upload functionality will be available in a future update
owner.preferredLanguageHelp: Default language for the interface and content.
owner.profileImageHelp: Upload a profile picture to personalize your account. Recommended size: 200x200px.
owner.getStartedByCreatingCategory: Get started by creating your first category
owner.confirmDeleteCategory: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
owner.sortOrderHelp: Lower numbers appear first in the list

upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop files here, or click to select
